goal: Compare Dropout (p=0.3) vs DropConnect (p=0.3) on a 3-layer MLP for MNIST digit classification. Hypothesis: DropConnect provides better generalization at same dropout rate. Use MLP (784→512→256→10), 3 seeds, 10 epochs, 2000 samples. Use torchvision.datasets.MNIST for data loading. Paired t-test + Cohen's d.
